center.name: Serranía del Baudó
center.summary: Serranía del Baudó是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括大绿金刚鹦鹉、Chestnut-crowned gnateater、绿枕靓唐纳雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: chocoensis is found in Colombia on the western slope of the Western Andes and in the Serranía del Baudó of western Chocó Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This bird is very uncommon in Ecuador. In Colombia it is reasonably common in the Darién region and the Gulf of Urabá near the Panamanian border, and is also found in the north of the Serranía de Baudó mountains on the Pacific coast, the West Andes, and found eastwards to the dry forests of the upper Sinú valley near the Caribbean coast.{{cite report |author=Javier Otero |author2=Diana P

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Serranía del Darién and Serranía del Baudó (Colombia and Panama)
